title: Rollback Automation Definition
description: Schema readiness for rollback automation definitions, covering rollback triggers, steps, precondition checks, and post-rollback verification.

fields.name: rollback_trigger_schema
fields.purpose: Schema defining conditions and events that trigger automated rollback

fields.name: rollback_step_sequence_schema
fields.purpose: Schema for ordered rollback step definitions

fields.name: rollback_precondition_checklist
fields.purpose: Checklist schema for pre-rollback safety conditions

fields.name: rollback_target_version_spec
fields.purpose: Schema for specifying rollback target versions and artifacts

fields.name: rollback_approval_gate_schema
fields.purpose: Schema for approval gates required before rollback execution

safety_notes: Schema readiness only. No real rollback execution, no automated rollback triggers, no deployment rollback. All rollback automation remains disabled.
